title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 99.
content:
There was an Old Person of Gretna,
    Who rushed down the crater of Etna;
    When they said, "Is it hot?"
    He replied, "No, it's not!"
    That mendacious Old Person of Gretna.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 99."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
